basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 12 Project Fellow, Project Associate and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 12 Project Positions Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 25-05-2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for specific age limit details for each post. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

qualification.details: Project Fellow: PhD Civil Engg. with 5+ years of experience. Project Associate: BTech Civil Engg. with 4-5 years of experience. Project Associate: BTech Computer Science with 1-2 years of experience. Project Associate: BTech Electronics and Communication (experience not mandatory). Project Associate: BTech Civil (experience not mandatory). Research Associate: MTech Civil with 1-3 years of experience. Research Associate: MTech Mechanical (experience not mandatory). Research Associate: MTech Civil (experience not mandatory). Research Associate: MTech Computer Science (experience not mandatory).

salary_details.details: Project Fellow: 100000 + HRA Project Associate: 60000 + HRA, 40000 + HRA, 30000 + HRA Research Associate: 60000 + HRA, 40000 + HRA, 30000 + HRA, 45000 + HRA

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Roorkee Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Roorkee Project Positions?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the IIT Roorkee Project Positions is 25 May 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Positions at IIT Roorkee?
faq.answer: There are a total of 12 vacancies announced for various Project Positions at the Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is via Email. Candidates need to send their applications to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q4. What are the minimum qualifications required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualifications range from BTech to PhD degrees in relevant engineering disciplines, as specified for each post.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for IIT Roorkee Project Positions?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST category candidates for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the Project Positions?
faq.answer: The salary structure varies for different positions, ranging from 30000 + HRA up to 100000 + HRA, depending on the post and experience.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the candidates?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications, followed by an online interview and document verification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the duration of the project positions?
faq.answer: The project duration is up to 23 April 2028, indicating a contractual role for the selected candidates.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Roorkee located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee is located in Roorkee, Uttarakhand, with the pincode 247667.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates with no prior experience apply?
faq.answer: Yes, for some Project Associate and Research Associate positions, experience is not mandatory, as stated in the notification.
